question: Is the image a realistic photograph of a winter cabin porch at evening blue hour?
Does the lighting show a mix of cold blue ambient light and warm yellow light from a wall-mounted lamp?
Is there a dark wood door centered in the frame?
Is the door handle black wrought iron with frost visible along its edges?
Is there a round pine wreath adorned with red berries hanging at the center of the door?
Are there exactly two pairs of skis leaning vertically against the wall to the left of the door?
Does the front pair of skis have a white base with dark blue geometric patterns and tips pointing upward?
Is the rear pair of skis pure black with tips pointing upward?
Are there exactly two ski poles crossed in front of the skis with tips resting on the ground?
Are the ski pole wrist straps dangling down and pressing into the snow, leaving visible marks?
Is there a wooden rocking chair positioned on the right side of the frame?
Is a gray and white checkered wool blanket draped over the rocking chair seat?
Does one corner of the blanket hang down touching the ground with snow clinging to it?
Is there a knit beanie resting on the blanket?
Are there exactly two pairs of snow boots on the ground in front of the rocking chair?
Is the front pair of boots black with toes pointing to the left?
Is the rear pair of boots pure white with toes pointing to the right and partially covered by fresh snow?
Is there an upright stainless steel thermos standing behind the boots with the lid closed and no pattern?
Are there exactly two glass storm lanterns side by side on the wooden steps in the lower left corner?
Does the left lantern contain a lit candle with a warm yellow flame?
Does the right lantern contain a candle with a cold blue flame that is slightly elongated?
Is there a white ceramic mug with thin wisps of steam rising located to the right of the lanterns?
Is there a dark-colored mug beside the white one emitting thicker steam, with no pattern on its body?
Are there two rows of footprints leading from the lower right toward the door and stopping at the doorstep?
Is there a set of smaller animal paw prints crossing from the lower left past the step edge?
Are there exactly seven icicles hanging from the eaves in the upper right corner?
Are the icicles semi-transparent, reflecting the warm lamp glow, and varying slightly in length with tapered tips?
Is the lower half of a snow-covered pine tree visible in the background on the left?
Are the pine tree branches bending downward under the weight of the snow?
Is the image free from severe artifacts, distortions, or physically impossible floating objects?
